name: Almere (Netherlands)
description: Quartered white, red, blue and yellow, the white canton charged with a stylised ship (cog).
history: Flag of the municipality of Almere in the province of Flevoland, a planned new town on reclaimed land that grew rapidly from the late 1970s. The ship recalls the maritime past of the Zuiderzee that the polder replaced.

features.role: a stylised ship (cog) in the white canton
